build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(40, 20, 5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(2).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=5).rect(18, 10).extrude(2)

STEP 4: Create pivot pin — cq.Workplane("XY").circle(2).extrude(30)

STEP 5: Chamfer pivot pin — .faces(">Z").chamfer(1, 1)
